name: Honey Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the brown sugar and water in a saucepan. Heat over medium-high heat until the sugar dissolves completely.
2. Bring to a boil without stirring. Allow the mixture to cool slightly.
3. Remove from heat and let cool for a few minutes.
4. Add the beaten eggs, honey, and nutmeg to the cooled sugar syrup. Stir thoroughly until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into prepared tart shells, filling them 2/3 full.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes or until set.
7. Allow to cool before serving.
